mnemonics: My Cat Has Nine Lives Underwater Making Jellies Always Float
Many Cats Have Nine Lives Underwater Making Jellies Always Float
keyPoints: Definition of Cloud Computing: A model of delivering computing services over the internet
Characteristics of Cloud Computing: Scalability, On-Demand Self-Service, Broad Network Access, Resource Pooling
Types of Cloud Computing: Public, Private, Hybrid
Cloud Service Models: Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS), Platform as a Service (PaaS), Software as a Service (SaaS)
Cloud Deployment Models: Public, Private, Hybrid
